name: GALLOWGLASS
description: The GALLOWGLASS is the EBS line striker: a stubborn duelist chassis built around a hardlight construct printer that arms its pilot with whatever the battle demands.

traits.name: Diehard
traits.description: The GALLOWGLASS does not become Impaired after suffering a Glancing Blow from Structure Damage and does not become Stunned when it has 3+ Structure and suffers a Direct Hit.

core_system.name: Hardlight Construct Printer
core_system.passive_effect: (Protocol, 1/Scene) Construct a weapon from hard light. You must have the license for the weapon but must not have it equipped. It can be used for a single attack before the hard light dissipates. This weapon does not require an open mount to use but it must be a weapon that could be mounted on one of the mounts of the GALLOWGLASS.

passive_actions.name: The Sun's Treasure
passive_actions.detail: Construct a weapon from hard light. You must have the license for the weapon but must not have it equipped. It can be used for a single attack before the hard light dissipates. This weapon does not require an open mount to use but it must be a weapon that could be mounted on one of the mounts of the GALLOWGLASS.

core_system.active_effect: As The Sun's Treasure, except the hard light weapon lasts for the remainder of the Scene. Take 1 Heat when it is used to attack.

name: VARANGI
description: A towering EBS bulwark chassis, the VARANGI anchors the line, sheltering its lance behind reactive plate and an iron arm.

traits.name: Guardian
traits.description: Adjacent allies can use the VARANGI as hard cover.

traits.name: Long Reach
traits.description: The VARANGI increases the Threat of all Melee Weapons by 1.

traits.name: Slow
traits.description: The VARANGI has +1 Difficulty on Agility checks.

core_system.name: Iron Arm
core_system.passive_effect: When the VARANGI is adjacent to an ally it gains 2 Armor (this can exceed the maximum of 4 Armor).
core_system.active_effect: The VARANGI grants 2 Armor to itself and allies within Threat until the end of the scene.

name: PURBIYA
description: A light, hypertuned EBS striker that hunts alongside its inseparable feline drone, the PROWLER.

traits.name: Hypertuned
traits.description: The PURBIYA gains +1 Advantage on saves against Slow effects.

traits.name: Fell Hunter
traits.description: The PURBIYA does +1d6 damage to deployables.

traits.name: Only I Get One
traits.description: The PURBIYA grants its deployables within Sensors Overshield equal to Grit.

traits.name: Codependent Power Banks
traits.description: While the PROWLER is destroyed the PURBIYA has +1 Disadvantage on all d20 rolls.

core_system.name: PROWLER Drone
core_system.passive_effect: The PURBIYA is always accompanied by a feline drone, the PROWLER.

deployables.name: PROWLER
deployables.detail: Feline drone companion. Plasma Claws (Main Melee): 1d3+3 Energy, attacks at 1d20 + Grit.

core_system.active_effect: The PURBIYA can indicate an enemy within Sensors for the PROWLER to attack. The PROWLER will attack that enemy until the target is destroyed or given a different target. The Power Cycle die tracks the PROWLER's attack upgrades.

name: MYROI
description: A massive EBS command platform that prints and directs legions of subalterns — the 10,000 — across the battlefield.

traits.name: Field Officer
traits.description: 1/Round the MYROI can Activate a deployable as a Protocol.

traits.name: Micronet
traits.description: Subalterns equipped by the MYROI can use weapons mounted on the MYROI as if they had the Turret System. The Subaltern Squad must still be jockeying the MYROI.

core_system.name: 10,000 Printer
core_system.passive_effect: Gain Protocol — Print 10,000 (Limited 4): The MYROI can print a team of unique subalterns known as the 10,000.

passive_actions.name: Print 10,000
passive_actions.detail: (Limited 4) The MYROI prints a team of unique subalterns known as the 10,000.

core_system.active_effect: Print a set of 10,000 with 2 optional tags, managed by a SARGENT Comp/Con. They act on the MYROI's turn, then explode in Burst 1 for 5 Energy AP when depleted or when the scene ends.

name: IKKI
description: A slim EBS support frame whose entropy drive spreads pain across the lance, converting suffering into staying power.

traits.name: Energy Conversion Coils
traits.description: 1/Round the IKKI can attempt a Hull Save when suffering Transferred damage or a Tech Save when suffering Transferred heat. If successful, the IKKI gains Resistance to the damage.

traits.name: Slim Profile
traits.description: The IKKI gains the Hard Cover bonus from Soft Cover.

core_system.name: Entropy Drive
core_system.active_effect: When allies within Sensors of the IKKI suffer damage, the IKKI can Transfer some of that damage to other allies within Sensors — splitting the damage or heat as evenly as possible. Without Energy Conversion Coils this damage cannot be Resisted or reduced in any way. This effect lasts for 1 Scene.

name: MEDJAY
description: An EBS controller chassis built around a javelin printer, raining arcing munitions along non-Euclidian firing solutions.

traits.name: Non-Euclidian Geometric Interface
traits.description: The MEDJAY gains +1 Advantage on attacks with weapons that have the Arcing tag.

traits.name: Pack Mentality
traits.description: Allies in line of sight and Sensors receive +1 on Agility Saves.

core_system.name: Javelin Printer
core_system.passive_effect: Core Integrated Weapon: Javelin — Range 10, 1d6 Kinetic, Arcing. Can produce specialty javelins (Radio, Relay, Crackdown, Lockup).
core_system.active_effect: Range 15: create three Burst 2 fields of dangerous terrain, dealing 2 Energy AP and 1 Heat on failed Engineering checks. The fields persist for 1 Scene.

name: MARMETINE
description: A regal EBS artillery-controller whose crowned silhouette commands the field: to strike at it is to invite paralysis.

traits.name: Lordly Raiment
traits.description: +1 Accuracy to a single d20 roll 1/Round.

traits.name: Sovereign's Gaze
traits.description: 1/Round the MARMETINE can Scan as a Free Action. A character can only be scanned in this way 1/Scene.

traits.name: Complex Design
traits.description: The MARMETINE must spend 2 repairs to repair a destroyed system during rests instead of 1.

core_system.name: The Crown
core_system.passive_effect: Tech Attacks made against the MARMETINE within its Sensor range are made with +1 Difficulty.
core_system.active_effect: Attacks and tech attacks made against the MARMETINE within its Sensor range are made with +1 Difficulty. If the attack or tech attack fails, the attacker is Immobilized (1/Scene per character).
